name: shaula-remotion-social-video
description: Renders a kinetic split-flap headline video for a therapy practice from its ALREADY-LINTED approved phrases. Honesty parity with the website: the composition renders only the phrases it is handed (engine-linted tokens) and invents nothing.

scripts.render:northstar: node scripts/build-props.mjs ../fixtures/northstar-denver/practice.json props/northstar.json && remotion render SplitFlapHeadline out/northstar.mp4 --codec=h264 --props=props/northstar.json
